source_intake_record.raw_question_text: The $pV$-diagram in figure shows the cycle for a refrigerator operating on 0.850 mol of $H_2$. Assume that the gas can be treated as ideal. Process $ab$ is isothermal. Find the coefficient of performance of this refrigerator.
